summary: Built /registry and /claims/:id pages on citation.is. Diagnosed and fixed blank page caused by missing server-side proxy for public REST API. Added Registry nav link. 26/26 tests pass.
workCompleted: Audited ttruthdesk.claims public REST API — GET /api/public/claims (paginated, filterable) and GET /api/public/claims/:id (full detail with JSON-LD)
Extended server/externalProxy.ts with /api/external/public/* passthrough to https://ttruthdesk.claims/api/public/*
Added PublicClaim, PublicClaimDetail, PublicClaimsPage, RegistryQuery types to client/src/lib/api.ts
Added registryClaims() and claimById() functions to lib/api.ts
Created client/src/pages/RegistryPage.tsx — searchable, filterable, paginated registry of 3,863 claims
Created client/src/pages/ClaimDetail.tsx — full claim detail with verdict hero, rationale, evidence, metadata grid, external links (audit_url, page_url), JSON-LD ClaimReview SEO injection
Added Registry link (Database icon) to Nav.tsx
Wrote server/registry.proxy.test.ts — 6 Vitest tests for the new proxy (list, detail, 404, network error, verdict filter, query filter)
Installed supertest + @types/supertest for HTTP integration testing
Restored @types/web-push after it was removed during supertest install
bugsDiagnosed: Blank page on citation.is/registry: production site was serving old JS bundle (index-CcgC9A3S.js) that called /api/external/public/claims — an endpoint that did NOT exist on the old server. Fix: added the proxy route to externalProxy.ts and published new checkpoint.

SocketException 'Failed host lookup: api.manus.im': transient Cloud Run cold-start DNS issue, not a code bug. Production server resolves api.manus.im correctly once warm. Previously documented in phase-log.md under Auth Migration commit 5910511.
pendingActions: User needs to click Publish in Manus Management UI to deploy checkpoint 2ea46eef to citation.is
Consider adding URL query param persistence to /registry filters for bookmarkable filtered views
Consider adding 'Copy citation link' button on /claims/:id
Consider wiring /registry Recent claims to homepage
